common.siteDescription: Open-source platform for Madagascar's endemic freshwater fish — species profiles, distribution, and conservation coordination.

directory.title: Species Directory
directory.description: Browse endemic species. Filter by IUCN Red List category, family, or captive-population coverage.

map.title: Distribution Map
map.description: Locality records across Madagascar's freshwater systems, color-coded by IUCN category.

dashboard.title: Conservation Dashboard
dashboard.description: Counts of species assessments, ex-situ coverage, and field programs, refreshed hourly.

directory.title: Species Directory
directory.subtitle: Endemic freshwater fishes of Madagascar
directory.metaDescription: Browse endemic freshwater fish species of Madagascar. Filter by IUCN Red List category, family, and captive-population coverage.
directory.headerCounts: {total} endemic freshwater fish species ({described} described, {undescribed} undescribed)
directory.matchCount: {count} {count, plural, one {species matches} other {species match}} the current filters.

emptyState.title: No species match these filters
emptyState.subtitle: {total} species in the directory total. Try relaxing one filter.
emptyState.bodyFiltered: Active filters: {filters}. Of {total} species in the registry, none currently match. Clear one or more filters to widen the search.

emptyStateBackendDown.title: Species directory temporarily unavailable
emptyStateBackendDown.body: The species data service is unreachable right now. The registry is unchanged — try again in a moment.

profile.noDataMessage: Limited public data is available for this species. The most recent IUCN assessment is linked below; additional information will be added as published.

notFound.title: Species not found
notFound.description: We couldn't find a species with that ID. It may have been merged or removed.

map.title: Distribution Map
map.subtitle: Locality records for endemic freshwater fish
map.metaDescription: Locality records for endemic freshwater fish across Madagascar, color-coded by IUCN Red List category. Exact coordinates for threatened species are generalized per GBIF sensitive-species guidance.
map.recordCount: {count, plural, one {# locality record} other {# locality records}}
map.clearFilterAriaLabel: Clear species filter and show all locality records
map.keyboardHint: Markers are color-coded by IUCN Red List category. Coordinates for threatened species are generalized per GBIF sensitive-species guidance. For keyboard and screen-reader access, use the list view toggle above.
map.noticeOfflineBasemap: Using offline basemap — satellite imagery unavailable
map.noticeGeneralized: Coordinates for threatened species are generalized per GBIF sensitive-species guidance. Tier 3+ coordinators see exact coordinates.

emptyState.title: No locality records to show
emptyState.subtitle: Try adjusting filters or zooming out.

emptyStateBackendDown.title: Distribution map temporarily unavailable
emptyStateBackendDown.body: The locality data service is unreachable right now. Try again in a moment, or use the species directory for profiles, conservation status, and other details that don't depend on the map.

emptyStateNoRecords.title: No locality records to map
emptyStateNoRecords.bodyForSpecies: No public locality records are available for this species. Exact coordinates for threatened species are restricted to coordinator-tier accounts; the species profile still shows conservation status, taxonomy, and other details that don't depend on locality data.
emptyStateNoRecords.bodyAll: No locality records are currently published. The species directory still lists every species in the registry, whether or not their localities have been mapped.

login.metaDescription: Sign in to access tier-restricted content.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in unlocks tier-restricted views — exact locality coordinates for sensitive species, the coordinator dashboard, and partner-only data. Species profiles, the public map, and the conservation dashboard are open without an account.
login.verifiedBanner: Email verified. Sign in to continue.
login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

signup.metaTitle: Create an account — Madagascar Freshwater Fish
signup.metaDescription: Create a researcher account to access tier-restricted occurrence data and submit observations.
signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: New accounts start as Tier 2 (Registered Researcher), which adds access to occurrence datasets and observation submission. Higher tiers — for ex-situ coordinators and program managers — are assigned by the platform operator on request. Public profiles, the map, and the conservation dashboard remain open without an account.
signup.passwordHelp: At least 12 characters. Avoid common passwords and anything close to your email or name.
signup.submittedTitle: Check your email to finish signing up.
signup.submittedBody: If an account can be created with that address, a verification link is on its way. The link is valid for 48 hours. If nothing arrives, check your spam folder, then try registering again.

verify.metaTitle: Verify your account — Madagascar Freshwater Fish
verify.metaDescription: Activate your account by verifying the email link.
verify.title: Verification link

missingToken.title: This link is missing its verification token.
missingToken.bodyPrefix: Open the link directly from your verification email — the URL should end with
missingToken.bodyMiddle: . If your email client truncated the link, you can

expired.title: This verification link is no longer valid.
expired.bodyPrefix: Links expire 48 hours after sign-up, and each link can only be used once. To finish creating your account,
expired.bodySuffix: and we'll send a new link to your email.

transient.title: We couldn't verify your account just now.
transient.bodyPrefix: The verification service is temporarily unreachable. Try the link again in a few minutes. If it keeps failing, the platform team can verify your account manually — contact details are on the

errors.title: This page could not be loaded
errors.subtitle: An unexpected error interrupted rendering. Try again in a moment, or return to the home page.

notFound.metaTitle: Page not found — Madagascar Freshwater Fish
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This address does not match any page on the platform. The link may be out of date, or the page may have moved.

footer.license: Madagascar Freshwater Fish Conservation Platform — Apache-2.0
footer.dataNote: Data mirrored from IUCN, FishBase, GBIF, ZIMS, SHOAL, and CARES.
